case_title: YUEN, ALLAN WING LUN vs. TERRY, JACK et al

docket_entries.description: SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF YUEN, ALLAN WING LUN
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAR-24-1994, DISMISSAL

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF YUEN, ALLAN WING LUN AS TO DEFENDANT TERRY, JACK DOES 1 THROUGH 30, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUL-06-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-04-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUN-16-1993

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-06-1993, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON JUL-06-1993, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), SANCTION STAYED IF PLAINTIFF COMPLIES WITH RULES., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-07-1993 CONTINUED FROM JUL-06-1993 TO SEP-07-1993 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-07-1993, CONTINUED TO NOV-08-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 STAY LIFTED AS $50.00 OF SANCTIONS, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE 11/8/93. FURTHER STATUS. PLAINTIFF TO GIVE NOTICE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-07-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON JAN-07-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO SHOW CAUSE WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED.
